lineage.Process: Merge 重庆建成区1_Polygon1_Polygon;重庆_Polygon E:\重庆\重庆建成区.shp "NAME "NAME" true true false 14 Text 0 0 ,First,#,重庆建成区1_Polygon1_Polygon,NAME,-1,-1,重庆_Polygon,NAME,-1,-1;REMARK "REMARK" true true false 6 Text 0 0 ,First,#,重庆建成区1_Polygon1_Polygon,REMARK,-1,-1,重庆_Polygon,REMARK,-1,-1;area "area" true true false 4 Short 0 4 ,First,#,重庆建成区1_Polygon1_Polygon,area,-1,-1;areaarea "areaarea" true true false 8 Long 0 8 ,First,#,重庆建成区1_Polygon1_Polygon,areaarea,-1,-1;s "s" true true false 1 Short 0 1 ,First,#,重庆建成区1_Polygon1_Polygon,s,-1,-1;标识 "标识" true true false 6 Text 0 0 ,First,#,重庆建成区1_Polygon1_Polygon,标识,-1,-1"

Merge 重庆;重庆建成区 D:\城市体检\重庆\重庆_Merge.shp "NAME "NAME" true true false 14 Text 0 0 ,First,#,重庆,NAME,-1,-1,重庆建成区,NAME,-1,-1;REMARK "REMARK" true true false 6 Text 0 0 ,First,#,重庆,REMARK,-1,-1,重庆建成区,REMARK,-1,-1;area "area" true true false 4 Short 0 4 ,First,#,重庆,area,-1,-1,重庆建成区,area,-1,-1;areaarea "areaarea" true true false 8 Long 0 8 ,First,#,重庆,areaarea,-1,-1,重庆建成区,areaarea,-1,-1;s "s" true true false 1 Short 0 1 ,First,#,重庆,s,-1,-1,重庆建成区,s,-1,-1;标识 "标识" true true false 6 Text 0 0 ,First,#,重庆,标识,-1,-1,重庆建成区,标识,-1,-1;area_1 "area_1" true true false 19 Double 0 0 ,First,#,重庆,area_1,-1,-1,重庆建成区,area_1,-1,-1"

Project 重庆_Merge D:\建成区成果\第四批\重庆市建成区2022_CGCS2000_108E.shp PROJCS['CGCS2000_3_Degree_GK_CM_108E',GEOGCS['GCS_China_Geodetic_Coordinate_System_2000',DATUM['D_China_2000',SPHEROID['CGCS2000',6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM['Greenwich',0.0],UNIT['Degree',0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION['Gauss_Kruger'],PARAMETER['False_Easting',500000.0],PARAMETER['False_Northing',0.0],PARAMETER['Central_Meridian',108.0],PARAMETER['Scale_Factor',1.0],PARAMETER['Latitude_Of_Origin',0.0],UNIT['Meter',1.0]] # GEOGCS['GCS_WGS_1984',DATUM['D_WGS_1984',SPHEROID['WGS_1984',6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM['Greenwich',0.0],UNIT['Degree',0.0174532925199433]] NO_PRESERVE_SHAPE # NO_VERTICAL
DeleteField 重庆市建成区2022_CGCS2000_108E NAME;REMARK;areaarea;s;标识;area_1
